title: Totem of Amogus
description: Turns the totem of undying into a 2d amogus totem.
body:
This resource pack replaces the standard Totem of Undying in Minecraft with a custom 2D sprite designed to resemble the popular 'Amogus' meme and makes your experience in the game a bit more fun.
